overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia riding a horse through a sunlit forest trail. The character navigates around a broken wooden bridge obstacle and continues up a rocky hillside path in a lush natural environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding his horse at a steady trot through the shaded forest trail, surrounded by tall pine trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
thick tree cover creating partial shade overhead
green grass and ferns growing alongside the path
hazy mountains visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt riding through a dense forest trail surrounded by tall pine trees. The path is narrow and shaded by the thick canopy overhead, with green undergrowth lining both sides of the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with broken wooden bridge obstacle

events.description: horse slows and maneuvers around the broken wooden bridge and cart wreckage blocking the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt guiding his horse to carefully navigate around the wooden debris and broken cart blocking the trail

entered.detail: destroyed wooden bridge structure with broken planks blocking the main path
wrecked wooden cart with broken wheels lying on its side
large gray rock formation alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a clearing where a broken wooden bridge and abandoned cart block the path. Geralt slows his horse to navigate around the debris, moving onto rocky terrain to bypass the obstacle.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside trail with scattered rocks

events.description: passing an abandoned wooden cart on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding uphill along the winding trail through open grassland with scattered trees

entered.detail: open grassy slope with wildflowers and tall grass
large boulders and rocky outcrops along the trail edge
weathered wooden posts marking the trail boundary
second wooden cart wreckage sitting beside the path

segments.scene_description: After clearing the obstacle, the trail opens into a wide grassy hillside with full sky visibility. Geralt continues riding uphill along the winding dirt path, passing scattered rocks and a second abandoned cart on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded forest interior into a wide, sunlit hillside landscape. It begins with Geralt riding along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by tall pine trees and a thick, darkening canopy. As the forest opens into a clearing, the camera tracks the horse slowing to navigate around a broken wooden bridge and an abandoned cart resting on rocky terrain. The scene then expands as the path leads out of the woods and onto a grassy hillside under a clear, open sky. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail uphill, passing scattered rocks and another abandoned cart as the environment transforms into a bright, elevated vista.
